(B) Inboth Hindi and English version, - (a) against serial number 5, in column (2), for the words “Water Resources Department”, the words “Public ‘Works Department” shall be substituted; (b) against serial number 11, in column (2), for the words “Shri Sushant S. Naik”, the words “Dr. Sushant S. Naik” shall be substituted; (c) against serial number 13, in column (2), for the word “Director”, the words “Director and Exofficio Joint Secretary” shall be substituted. [F. No.12-6/2005-IA Il (part)] Dr. SUJIT KUMAR BAJPAYEE, Jt. Secy.
